theme_archetype: Clinical Trust with Vibrant Accents (Archetype 1 + High Contrast 4)
design_philosophy: A professional veterinary app that balances medical authority (clear data, structured grids) with approachable warmth (vibrant brand colors, pet-centric). Designed for mobile (Expo React Native) with large touch targets and high-contrast data visualization.

buttons.primary: Navy background, white text, bold. Coral background for key conversion actions.
buttons.secondary: Outline or subtle tint (e.g., bg-slate-100 dark:bg-slate-800).

inputs.style: Filled or Outlined with 1px border. Must have high-contrast focus state.
inputs.calculator_fields: Large, numeric keypads. Progress bar updates dynamically as inputs reach 100%.

cards.dashboard_stats: Bento-grid style. Minimal shadow (light mode) or subtle 1px border (dark mode).
cards.evaluation_type: Vertical illustrated cards. Dark navy background with coral/pink accent lines.
cards.result_screen: Massive full-width color-coded card matching the strict Heat Cycle Stage color. White or high-contrast dark text inside.

glassmorphism.usage: Splash screen overlay, modal backdrops, floating action buttons.
glassmorphism.style: Blur 10-20px, background white/20 or black/20 with 1px translucent border.

learning_module.description: Scientist in lab using microscope, for cytology learning screens.

dashboard_placeholders.description: Golden retriever puppy for placeholder dog avatars.

local_assets.instruction: Use the user-provided assets (evaluation type cards image, app logo image) located in the project's local assets folder. The logo should feature dual dog silhouettes (navy + coral) and paw heart. Ensure the 3 Evaluation cards use the provided reference images.

testing.instruction: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `testID` attribute in React Native (maps to data-testid). Use kebab-case, role-based naming (e.g., `login-form-submit-button`, `cytology-calc-pc-input`).

instructions_to_main_agent: This is an Expo React Native mobile app. Use native View/Text components and StyleSheet/NativeWind.
Implement the splash screen with a linear gradient using the exact colors: #3B82F6, #8B5CF6, #EC4899 and an animated loading bar.
Ensure Result Screen completely transforms its visual weight to match the diagnosed heat cycle stage color.
The Heat Cycle Visual Timeline should be a horizontal scrollable timeline or a progressive flow highlighting the current stage in its designated color.
For the 3 Evaluation Type cards, enforce vertical aspect ratios with dark navy backgrounds and coral accents, leaving space for the user's local reference images.
Ensure the application strictly follows light/dark mode paradigms, avoiding pure white/black, instead using the specified surface Slate/Navy tones.
All forms (Registration, New Evaluation) must use appropriate React Native keyboard types (e.g., numeric for weight/age).
